nasb.text: For the days will come upon you when your enemies will throw up a barricade against you, and surround you and hem you in on every side,

esv.text: For the days will come upon you, when your enemies will set up a barricade around you and surround you and hem you in on every side

cnv.text: 日子將到，你的仇敵必築壘攻擊你，周圍環繞你，四面困住你，

ccb.text: 因为有一天敌人要在你周围筑起壁垒把你团团围住，四面攻击你。

csbs.text: 因为日子将临到你，你的敌人要筑起壁垒包围你，四面困住你。
